name: PanelDue Firmware (ARM Cross-Compile)
postCreateCommand: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends gcc-arm-none-eabi binutils-arm-none-eabi libnewlib-arm-none-eabi libstdc++-arm-none-eabi-dev libstdc++-arm-none-eabi-newlib cmake make ccache && git submodule update --init --recursive
